localization.name: Elemental Strike
localization.description:
Damage to 1 enemy and Weaken them. Then enemies lose Spirit equal to the number of Element types that remain on the battlefield.

Weakened units have their Attack reduced to 0.75x until the end of their next turn. The effect of Weakening may be diminished if the affected unit's Attack is increased by other effects and it can be overwritten by Enrage effects.
localization.selected: 100% damage to an enemy and Weaken them

localization.name: Elemental Sweep
localization.description:
50% damage to all enemies. This attack ignores damage reduction effects, skin passive skills, the Stealth Status Effect, and the Counter Stance Status Effect.

Then heals all allies for 1% of their max HP. This triggers once for each Element type on the battlefield.

Unlocked each time the user damages an enemy with another attack. This skill is locked again after each use or if the user leaves the battlefield.
localization.selected: Damage all enemies, and heals allies

localization.name: Elemental Burst
localization.description: Damage 1 enemy. This attack ignores any effects of non-boss enemies that would prevent the target from being defeated. 300% damage instead if the user or target have defeated 1 unit with an attack while on the battlefiled. 400% damage instead if the user or target have defeated 2+ units with attacks while on the battlefield.
localization.selected: Up to 400% damage, ignores defeat prevention

localization.name: Elemental Wipe
localization.description:
Immediately defeats 1 non-boss enemy, the user is considered to have defeated the target with an attack if successful. This effect ignores Revenge passive skills, Revival passive skills, any passive skills or effects of active skills that would prevent the target from being defeated, and cannot be redirected by Guardians.

Locked for 200TU after the user has entered the battlefield. This lock is ignored while all 6 Element types are on the battlefield. Usable once per battle.

localization.name: Elemental Palette
localization.description:
This unit cannot be defeated by damage from Poison or Burn status effects.

When attacking, adds 100% to the damage % of this unit's attacks for each Element type on the battlefield. (e.g. Elemental Sweep: 50% => 350% damage when 3 Element types are on the battlefield)

When this unit damages an enemy with an attack, if they are:
- Water or Dark, Stun them for 100TU.
- Fire or Light, grant them the Sleep status effect for 100TU, even if they have already slept while on the battlefield. Sleep will overwrite other status effects on those units.
- Storm or Earth, grant them the Mega Poison status effect for 100TU. Mega Poison will overwrite other status effects on those units. Mega Poison deals 20 times the damage of normal Poison and cannot be overwritten by normal Poison or Super Poison.

localization.name: Great Hero
localization.description:
If this unit would be defeated by an enemy attack or a status effect while having more than 1 HP, it instead survives with 1 HP. This unit has 50% damage reduction from attacks.

Whenever this unit gets the turn, and survives until after the end of the turn, allies gain 1 Spirit.

localization.name: Immovable
localization.description: This unit cannot be sent to the reinforcements from the battlefield.

localization.name: Stun Immunity
localization.description: This unit is not affected by stun effects.

localization.name: Sleep Immunity
localization.description: This unit is not affected by sleep effects.
